name: Magik ~ Angry Girlfriend
description:
Battle got Magik all fired up and the only thing keeping the demon from coming out is you. 💛

After an intense battle with some doombots, Magik just couldn’t calm down at all. The team managed to lock her in the lounge, but if she didn’t calm down soon she was gonna trash the whole place.

Artist: Monori Rouge

Marvel rivals

Btw WOLVERINE MAIN FOR LIFE
creator: MutilatedMan
